checklist.description: Code searches for procedural entries using the most common tag found on procedural entries (e.g., accountable-commit) rather than hardcoding a search query
checklist.name: Procedural tag search

checklist.description: Code falls back to content-based search with query 'commit' when no obvious procedural tag exists
checklist.name: Fallback search

checklist.description: Report shows which tags appear most frequently across procedural entries specifically (not all entry types)
checklist.name: Tag frequency within procedural

checklist.description: Report shows branch distribution with counts of procedural entries per branch
checklist.name: Branch grouping

checklist.description: Anti-pattern detection catches double-prefix tags like scope:scope:db (entry p4 in sample data)
checklist.name: Double-prefix detection

checklist.description: Anti-pattern detection catches entries missing scope tags (entry p5 in sample data)
checklist.name: Missing scope detection

checklist.description: Anti-pattern detection catches entries missing branch tags (entry p7 in sample data)
checklist.name: Missing branch detection

checklist.description: Anti-pattern detection identifies overly generic tags that don't follow the namespace convention
checklist.name: Catch-all tag detection

checklist.description: Anti-pattern detection flags entries with unusually high files-changed counts
checklist.name: Broad entry detection

checklist.description: Analysis correctly excludes non-procedural entries (e.g., semantic entry p8) from commit pattern analysis
checklist.name: Non-procedural filtering

checklist.description: commit-report.md includes a dedicated section listing found anti-patterns with specific entries cited
checklist.name: Report has anti-patterns section

context: Tests whether the agent implements Phase 3 commit pattern analysis: using the most common procedural tag from Phase 1 to find entries, analyzing tag frequency and branch distribution within procedural entries, and detecting anti-patterns like double-prefix tags, missing branch/scope tags, and catch-all tags.
